name: overlord
description: Chat-driven access to Overlord mission protocol workflows with hook-driven activity capture.

interface.shortDescription: Run Overlord mission workflows from Codex chat
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Overlord's local mission workflow through the existing `ovld protocol` CLI. The plugin bundles workflow skills plus MCP tools for mission attachment, progress updates, shared context, artifacts, delivery, and follow-up mission creation.
defaultPrompt: Attach to Overlord mission 123 and summarize the context before editing code
Post an execute update to this Overlord mission after a meaningful implementation step
Deliver this Overlord mission with artifacts and change rationales
